prose:
**Nitrobenzene Fukui reactivity — computed result**

**Method used:** DFT tier `standard` = **B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, using chemkit’s `fukui-reactivity` task (`program: dft`; Mulliken charges from PySCF were reported). Input geometry: user-supplied XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz`; the Fukui calculation used this geometry as supplied. Density fitting was not requested. Cation/anion states used for finite-difference Fukui indices: cation charge +1 multiplicity 2; anion charge −1 multiplicity 2. Solvent: **gas phase** (`solvent: null`).

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = **atom 4 (C)** with **f+ = 0.49641781**. Most nucleophilic site = **atom 5 (C)** with **f− = 0.1072882**.

Per-atom Fukui indices from the tool:

| Atom label | Element | f+ | f− | f0 | Dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.47317276 | 0.097015524 | 0.28509414 | 0.37615724 |
| 2 | O | 0.47344363 | 0.096773921 | 0.28510877 | 0.37666971 |
| 3 | N | -0.45670088 | 0.017243458 | -0.21972871 | -0.47394434 |
| 4 | C | 0.49641781 | -0.014292037 | 0.24106289 | 0.51070985 |
| 5 | C | 0.11562653 | 0.1072882 | 0.11145736 | 0.008338328 |
| 6 | C | 0.11588205 | 0.10723661 | 0.11155933 | 0.00864544 |
| 7 | C | 0.17412422 | 0.094922441 | 0.13452333 | 0.079201778 |
| 8 | C | 0.17422942 | 0.094892499 | 0.13456096 | 0.079336918 |
| 9 | C | 0.28913576 | 0.0083116096 | 0.14872368 | 0.28082415 |
| 10 | H | -0.2316897 | 0.075212029 | -0.078238833 | -0.30690172 |
| 11 | H | -0.23181693 | 0.075202557 | -0.078307185 | -0.30701949 |
| 12 | H | -0.13372477 | 0.083883283 | -0.024920744 | -0.21760805 |
| 13 | H | -0.13379393 | 0.083881905 | -0.024956011 | -0.21767583 |
| 14 | H | -0.12430597 | 0.072428004 | -0.025938984 | -0.19673398 |

**Integrity verdict:** `trustworthy: true` (`status: ok`). Tool integrity checks reported charge conservation for f+ and f− as OK: `sum(f+) = 1.0000` and `sum(f-) = 1.0000`.

**Warnings:** no `warnings` array was present in the tool result, so no tool warnings were reported.

**Reproducibility:** exact chemkit command reported by the tool:
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpp8d4e6cw/live.json`

Plot path returned by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-183539_nitrobenzene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.

The chemkit result did not include an explicit live `.out` log path in the returned JSON, so I am not fabricating one.
